subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-06-04 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: This happiness is perpetual and results in heartfelt gladness throughout all the realms of God. When a person rejoices at the outpourings of heavenly grace
subcodes.first_line_orig: این سرور دائمی است و سبب انبساط دل و جان در جمیع عوالم الهی چون انسان سرورش
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @composure; tranquillity; serenity
